rankings.title: Maximum Stakes — The Local Effects of England's Fixed-Odds Betting Terminal Reform on Crime, Property Values, and Welfare
conditions: strong closure first-stage documented using establishment data
pre-trend/event-study evidence that holds under multiple exposure definitions
a pre-analysis plan that prioritizes 1–2 primary outcomes + mechanism tests to avoid “three papers in one”

rankings.title: The Border Effect — Scotland's Minimum Unit Pricing and Cross-Border Alcohol-Related Crime
conditions: credible
comparable Scotland crime series
a pre-specified border sample + inference plan
at least one strong behavioral first-stage proxy for cross-border purchasing/substitution

rankings.title: Flooding the Market — Extreme Weather Events and Small Business Survival in England
conditions: a defensible flood-event exposure measure at LSOA/postcode
validation against independent flood-loss/claim datasets if possible
improved business survival measurement beyond dissolution alone

rankings.title: Last Orders — Pub Closures and the Unraveling of Local Social Capital in England
Idea 1: Maximum Stakes — The Local Effects of England's Fixed-Odds Betting Terminal Reform
conditions: passing strict pre-trend tests
successfully demonstrating the mechanism via the vacant-storefront/online-displacement channels

rankings.title: Idea 4: Flooding the Market — Extreme Weather Events and Small Business Survival
conditions: pivoting the framing to a novel mechanism
such as how insurance pricing or local supply chains mediate the shock
rather than just estimating the direct ATE

rankings.title: Idea 3: The Border Effect — Scotland's Minimum Unit Pricing
Idea 2: Last Orders — Pub Closures and Local Social Capital
Maximum Stakes — The Local Effects of England's Fixed-Odds Betting Terminal Reform on Crime, Property Values, and Welfare
conditions: verifying first-stage shop closures by LA density
adding online gambling metrics if available

rankings.title: Last Orders — Pub Closures and the Unraveling of Local Social Capital in England
The Border Effect — Scotland's Minimum Unit Pricing and Cross-Border Alcohol-Related Crime
Flooding the Market — Extreme Weather Events and Small Business Survival in England
